summary: Final Apple Review copy/legal sweep landed on branch fix/apple-final-review-copy-and-links. Handoff/Tonight sync and caregiver-visible copy is fixed: the card now says "Tonight’s log is saved on this device." and "Updated just now." Invite caregiver no longer promises active sharing in Shape A: AccountSheet and Settings show a disabled/future-facing "Caregiver invites / Coming later" row and do not mount the active invite sheet. Pro card/paywall copy no longer says doctor-ready summary, more caregivers, or pediatrician-share summary; it uses "Fuller history, gentle weekly recaps, and export-ready summaries. Coming later." Privacy and Terms links continue to resolve from EXPO_PUBLIC_PRIVACY_POLICY_URL and EXPO_PUBLIC_TERMS_URL, with guarded openURL failure handling. Pro remains flag-gated/off for the intended submission; no bundle id, sync implementation, live paywall, or EAS submit path was changed.
validation_notes: npm run typecheck: exit 0. npm run lint: exit 0, clean. npm run check:local-interactions: All 391 checks passed, including AE9 for handoff/invite copy and W7b for Pro copy. git diff --check: clean.
manual_followups: Privacy Policy and Terms pages must be hosted before submission. If the placeholder lullaby.app URLs are used as fallbacks, those pages must actually exist; otherwise set EXPO_PUBLIC_PRIVACY_POLICY_URL and EXPO_PUBLIC_TERMS_URL in production EAS env.
Ensure EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPPORT_EMAIL points to a monitored mailbox before submission.

Decide account posture for the reviewed binary: ship accounts disabled/unconfigured for Shape A, or apply supabase/migrations/20260703060000_delete_account.sql before review so in-app Delete Account works.
If accounts are enabled, provide reviewer credentials and confirm the Supabase delete-account migration has been applied before App Store review.
Clinician sign-off: work docs/reassure-content-review.md and flip REASSURE_CONTENT.status to approved to unlock clinical KB in public builds.
Do not run EAS submit until App Store Connect credentials and manual metadata/review notes are ready.
apple_review_risk_remaining: Privacy/Terms links are only App Store safe if the configured or fallback pages are live before submission.
If accounts ship enabled and the delete-account migration is not applied remotely, Apple 5.1.1(v) remains a rejection risk.
App Store Connect app-privacy declaration and off-repo metadata must accurately reflect local-only behavior and no medical-advice claims.
No paywall risk for the intended submission as long as EXPO_PUBLIC_PRO_ENABLED stays off.
